# Product Roadmap (Phased Execution)

## 🟢 Phase 1 — MVP (Ship Fast, High Impact)

**Goal:** Make the product immediately useful for daily workflows

### Core Intelligence

* [ ] Ask-this-note (scoped Q&A on a note + attachments)
* [ ] Action items extraction (tasks, deadlines, people, decisions)
* [ ] Summary modes (brief + action-items first)
* [ ] Auto-generated titles

### Retrieval Basics

* [ ] Hybrid search (keyword + semantic)
* [ ] Query rewrite for vague queries

### UX Clarity

* [ ] Indexing status (indexing / ready / failed)
* [ ] Source jump (deep link to exact chunk/file)

---

## 🟡 Phase 2 — Engagement & Retention

**Goal:** Make users come back daily

### Discovery & Organization

* [ ] Auto tags and categories
* [ ] Similar notes (related + duplicates)
* [ ] Collections / folders

### Feedback Loops

* [ ] Pinned insights (AI → saved note)
* [ ] Explain why this matched (search transparency)

### Activity Awareness

* [ ] Daily digest / recent activity

---

## 🔵 Phase 3 — Power Features (Differentiation)

**Goal:** Become a “second brain”, not just a notes app

### Advanced AI

* [ ] Attachment-aware chat across all notes
* [ ] Vision support (charts, diagrams, screenshots)

### Knowledge Layer

* [ ] Backlinks between notes
* [ ] Knowledge graph view

### Advanced Retrieval

* [ ] Saved searches
* [ ] Smart filters

---

## 🟣 Phase 4 — Scale & Ops

**Goal:** Reliability, sharing, and monetization readiness

### Practical Features

* [ ] Export (Markdown / PDF)
* [ ] Share read-only links

### System Reliability

* [ ] Background queue + retry system
* [ ] Reindex button

### Business / Infra

* [ ] Usage dashboard (tokens, model usage)

---

## ⚡ Suggested Build Order (Week-by-Week)

### Week 1–2

* Ask-this-note
* Hybrid search (basic version)
* Indexing status

### Week 3–4

* Action item extraction
* Source jump
* Summary modes

### Week 5–6

* Auto tags + similar notes
* Query rewrite

### Week 7+

* Cross-note chat
* Knowledge graph
* Vision support

---

## 🧠 Key Principle

> **Search + clarity + actionability first.**
> If users can *find*, *trust*, and *act* on their notes, retention follows naturally.

Avoid overbuilding graph/visual features early—they look impressive but don’t drive daily usage initially.
